---
title: 'final'
author: 'erin'
format: 
    html:
        embed-resources: true
---


```{r}
a <- c(1, 2, 'a')
a
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)

```


```{r}
iris |> # note that this is a pipe!
    ggplot(aes(x = Sepal.Length, y = Sepal.Width)) + # whereas this is a 
    geom_point(aes(color = Species)) + 
        geom_smooth(method = 'lm') +
    labs(x = "Highway MPG", y = "City MPG")
```


```{r}
iris |> # note that this is a pipe!
    ggplot(aes(x = Sepal.Length, y = Sepal.Width, color = Species)) + # whereas this is a +!
    geom_point() + 
    geom_smooth(method = 'lm') +
    labs(x = "Highway MPG", y = "City MPG")
```


```{r}
zero <- FALSE
one <- c(zero, TRUE)
two <- one + 1L
three <- c(one^2, two, '3.0')
four <- as.factor(three)
five <- three[two[one[1]]]
```


```{r}
lst <- list(a = 1:3, b = matrix(1:4, 2))
```


```{r}
mat <- matrix(1:5, nrow = 1)
mat

```
